programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: High School Debut
programme.desc: Yoh agrees to teach Haruna how to get a boyfriend but on the condition she doesn't fall in love with him.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi Jung's mother frantically calls him threatening to commit suicide.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Dancing Cat
programme.desc: A documentary chronicling the daily dramas of Korea's street cats through the eyes of a poet.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: The World of Us
programme.desc: A bullied girl becomes friends with a new kid during a break, but when classes start up again, their new friendship is nearly ruined when the bullying continues.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Not too eager to watch Jan Di dancing with one of his best friends, Jun Pyo exits the ballroom and ends up taking out his frustrations by the poolside.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast-paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Money
programme.desc: Breaking news and projections before the start of the business day.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: VivaTech x Bloomberg Awards
programme.desc: VivaTech and Bloomberg join forces to create a new global awards platform to celebrate not just who's succeeding in tech, but who's shaping where tech goes next.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: Rafael Nadal: The Champion's Mindset On and Off the Tennis Court
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with tennis legend Rafael Nadal about the mindset that fueled his career; they explore how resilience, self-doubt and unwavering determination helped him overcome repeated injuries and become one of tennis's greatest champions.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.sub-title: BHP's Mike Henry on Critical Minerals and the Mining Giant's Future
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with outgoing BHP Chief Executive Officer Mike Henry about leading the world's largest mining company; he discusses the energy transition, the artificial intelligence boom and his role in reshaping BHP.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.sub-title: Arthur C. Brooks, Harvard Professor and NYT Bestselling Author
programme.desc: Arthur C. Brooks, Harvard professor and "NYT" bestselling author.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Experts offer bold takes on some of today's most important topics and cover stories and investigations at the intersection of business and culture.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wealth With David Rubenstein
programme.sub-title: Greg Fleming, Rockefeller Capital Management President and CEO
programme.desc: Greg Fleming, Rockefeller Capital Management President and CEO.

programme.title: The Cost of Brexit
programme.desc: A decade after the UK voted to leave the European Union, Bloomberg Originals examines the economic fallout of Brexit and the political forces it unleashed.

programme.title: Boston 25 Celebrates America 250
programme.desc: Learn about deep historic roots in Boston including the Freedom Trail.

programme.title: Ask Clark
programme.desc: Consumer Adviser, Clark Howard, takes questions from people around the country about how to live more affordably. From groceries to rent, healthcare and cars, Clark covers it all! Clark gives his best advice for making simple changes.

programme.title: Finding Answers
programme.desc: Jason Stoogenke leads a team of investigative reporters to expose scams, rip-offs and other consumer issues.

programme.title: Pulse: 10 Years Later
programme.desc: A look at where we are today, 10 years after the Pulse tragedy that killed 49 people.

programme.title: All For America
programme.desc: Stories of everyday heroes and acts of kindness that often go unnoticed.

programme.desc: Elton John drops by the Abbey Road studios while Patsy and Edina are there.

programme.title: Fled
programme.desc: Escaped convicts (Laurence Fishburne, Stephen Baldwin) fight while they evade authorities seeking a computer disk on Cuban mobsters.

programme.title: Original Gangstas
programme.desc: Former gang members return to depressed Gary, Ind., to quell violence perpetrated by their successors.

programme.title: Breakin' 2: Electric Boogaloo
programme.desc: Kelly (Lucinda Dickey) quits her job dancing in a chorus line in Los Angeles and goes home. Ignoring her father's wishes, Kelly teams up with her friends for a break-dancing benefit show to save an endangered community center.

programme.title: Good Fences
programme.desc: A black attorney (Danny Glover), his wife (Whoopi Goldberg) and their two children move to a posh neighborhood in Greenwich, Conn.

programme.title: Frankie & Alice
programme.desc: A therapist (Stellan Skarsgard) treats a black stripper (Halle Berry) who has multiple personality disorder, including that of an imperious white racist.

programme.title: From the Rough
programme.desc: Catana Starks becomes the first woman to coach a collegiate men's golf team and subsequently guides her misfit players to an all-time-record championship season.

programme.title: Cadence
programme.desc: A misfit soldier (Charlie Sheen) lands in a bully's (Martin Sheen) stockade with five men united by their race and their walk.

programme.title: Five Star
programme.desc: A longtime gang member (James 'Primo' Grant) shows a fast-taking teen (John Diaz) how to operate on the mean streets of Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: Racial tensions collide in a collection of intertwined stories involving residents of Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Waterboyz
programme.desc: Two young men cross paths on the dangerous streets of Atlanta. One tries to make a legitimate living, while the other tries to create mayhem and rule the streets.

programme.title: 100 Streets
programme.desc: Three different stories covering infidelity, adoption and a drug dealer turned actor are intertwined as characters meet in the streets of London.

programme.title: Cut Throat City
programme.desc: When Hurricane Katrina devastates New Orleans, four desperate friends band together to pull off a daring heist in the heart of the city.

programme.title: Armed Response
programme.desc: Trained operatives find themselves trapped inside an isolated military compound after its artificial intelligence is suddenly shut down. There, they begin to experience strange and horrific phenomena.

programme.title: As Good as Dead
programme.desc: Bryant befriends a troubled teen and introduces him to martial arts. As Bryant's mysterious and dangerous past catches up to him, he is forced into a life and death struggle to clear his name, save the boy and get back all he left behind.

programme.title: Soldier Boyz
programme.desc: An ex-Marine prison counselor leads juvenile offenders on a mission to rescue a tycoon's daughter held hostage in Vietnam.

programme.title: Enemies Closer
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL (Tom Everett Scott) becomes trapped in the wilderness with drug runners and an old enemy (Orlando Jones).

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: With help from a gangster, a betrayed man (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) seeks revenge for a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Shottas
programme.desc: Deported from the United States, two drug dealers (Ky-Mani Marley, Spragga Benz) travel to Miami and continue their violent ways.

programme.title: Love and a Bullet
programme.desc: Although ordered to kill his boss's girlfriend (Kent Masters-King), a hit man (Treach) develops feelings for her and reflects on his violent past.

programme.title: Caught in the Crossfire
programme.desc: Two detectives (Chris Klein, Richard T. Jones) are targeted by gangsters and crooked cops as they investigate an important case.

programme.title: Lila & Eve
programme.desc: After the senseless murder of her son (Aml Ameen), a grief-stricken mother (Viola Davis) joins forces with another woman (Jennifer Lopez) for vigilante justice.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: An angry Vietnam veteran (Lawrence-Hilton Jacobs) leads a Los Angeles street gang in a war on drug dealers.

programme.title: Synchronic
programme.desc: A New Orleans paramedic encounters a psychedelic drug that challenges everything he knows about reality -- and the flow of time itself.

programme.title: Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A screenwriter, his neglected wife and their guests become the prey of a deadly stranger who arrives on their doorstep.

programme.title: Monster's Ball
programme.desc: A racist prison guard has an affair with a Black woman after her husband, who was sentenced to capital punishment, dies.

programme.title: Beyond the Lights
programme.desc: A troubled star and an aspiring politician fall deeply in love, but those around the couple urge them to put their careers ahead of romance.

programme.title: Cops and Robbers
programme.desc: A hostage negotiator plays a dangerous game of cat and mouse with a cornered bank robber who is hell-bent on getting out of the bank and humiliating the negotiator in the process.

programme.title: On the Streets of L.A.
programme.desc: An estranged father and son are paroled from the same maximum-security prison with one unusual condition -- they must become roommates.

programme.title: Hendrix
programme.desc: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) innovates 1960s rock 'n' roll, then dies of a drug overdose at 27.

programme.title: Precious
programme.desc: Pregnant and abused, a Harlem teen (Gabourey Sidibe) enrolls in an alternative school in an attempt to bring value to her life.

programme.title: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: Three soldiers, including a doctor (Samuel L. Jackson), have difficulty adjusting to life at home following a long and difficult tour of duty in Iraq.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: One year after Hurricane Katrina, coach Al Collins (Forest Whitaker) gathers displaced students and turns them into a championship basketball team.

programme.title: Who Can I Run To?
programme.desc: A gospel singer (Tasha Page Lockhart) renews her faith after reuniting with her former group members.
A Los Angeles high-school teacher (Samuel L. Jackson) confronts violent students with a grudge against him and society.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Power figures want a Caribbean police chief (Denzel Washington) to find his friend Maubee (Robert Townsend), their scapegoat for a murder.

programme.title: The Last Letter
programme.desc: Catherine Wright struggles with a debilitating sleep disorder. Her husband Michael struggles to cope when their newborn son lay in the wake.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Max le reclama a Camila el haber amenazado a su mamá y le advierte sobre las verdaderas intenciones de Ezequiel. Continúan los conflictos por el romance entre Julia y Gregorio. Ezequiel presiona a Celso y Julia para que se casen.

programme.title: Trapos íntimos
programme.desc: Isabel consuela a Mariló. Lucía se entera de un chisme que la involucra y que la hace sentir muy triste. Doris insiste en estar con Fernando.

programme.title: Trapos íntimos
programme.desc: Lucía se siente muy dolida. Willy lo pasa mal. Isabel y Fernando trabajan juntos para poder solucionar una emergencia familiar. Federica no quiere a su hija de vuelta.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas
programme.desc: Tras perder a su madre, los hermanos Estrada ahora deben lamentar el fallecimiento de su padre. Acaban de quedarse solos en el mundo.

programme.title: Mis 3 hermanas

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Susie from Hey Grill Hey teaches you how to make a full family dinner right in your own backyard in under 30 minutes! When you serve this grilled honey mustard chicken, creamed corn, and mixed veggies, you'll feel like a Weeknight BBQ Hero!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: It's always kind of a party in the backyard, but it's really a party when Susie breaks out the smoker for some legendary pulled pork sliders, a homemade coleslaw, and a mac and cheese so creamy even the grownups will rave about it.

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: If you love outdoor grilling AND flexing your skills by entertaining guests, the next Backyard BBQ Hero is required viewing. Fire up the grill for a show-stopping Santa Maria-style tri tip, a zesty salad, and an unbelievable dinner bread!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Pitmaster Jason Neeley (Pica Rica BBQ) drops by the backyard to share some insider tips for nailing the perfect brisket and helps Susie make pickled vegetables to go alongside her dad's hot potato salad! This is a must-watch for serious Pitmasters.

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero
programme.desc: Grill fatigue is a very real problem, but the globally-inspired menu of carne asada, tomatillo salsa, Mexican street corn, and Tex-Mex beans in this episode of Backyard BBQ Hero is sure to reignite the fire inside and get you outside cooking!

programme.title: Backyard BBQ Hero

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah celebrate the 4th of July with a supersized barbecue menu including whole hog BBQ, lobster mac'n cheese, Texas-style char dogs, tri-tip and pinto beans.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and Parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Goose, one of Andrew's favorite game birds, is prepared two ways: a French onion soup-style grilled breast sandwich with caramelized onions and melted cheese, and a whole bird, cured, roasted on a beer can, and served with an apple-fennel salad.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares his favorite way to prepare wild turkey breast, pan-fried over an open fire. Served with cheese sauce and jalapeno-bacon wild rice. Then, cooks a simple meal of seared salmon and a side of crispy potatoes and onions.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reimagines the Hawaiian plate lunch with a hand chopped venison burger topped with homemade gravy and a fried egg, jumbo grilled shrimp, a humble macaroni salad and a heaping scoop of white rice.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew butchers a whole pheasant to make yakitori-style skewers and a homemade flatbread, cucumber salad and a mango chutney.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Chicken Fried Deer and Creole Halibut
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares chicken fried axis deer. Next, Chef Zimmern poaches halibut in tomato roux.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Elk Tenderloin Tostadas and Grilled Rack of Ribs
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights lean elk, first crafting classic Mexican tostadas with grilled tenderloin, avocado, and homemade salsa macha. Then, he grills a whole rack of elk, serving it with creamy colcannon, tarragon emulsion, and rosemary charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Creamy Clam Chowder and Mussels in Spicy Tomato Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies cooking clams, mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Striped Bass Crudo and Smoky Summer Succotash
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern celebrates summer's bounty with an elegant bass crudo and a whole roasted striped bass topped with a herb-packed compound butter and served alongside a smoky corn succotash studded with charred poblanos.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Venison Paillard and Hearty Hunter's Stew
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern showcases venison two ways: a delicate grilled paillard with artichokes and Parmesan, and a rich, slow-braised Polish hunter's stew with kielbasa, mushrooms, and sauerkraut. Served with grilled leeks and coal-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern transforms wild duck into a simple grilled appetizer inspired by Japanese tataki and then uses the rest of the duck to make open fire duck noodle soup with fresh egg noodles, lots of aromatic herbs, bean sprouts and a squeeze of lime.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the world's best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA border into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road, Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lover's paradise, and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated and is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birthplace of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean

programme.title: Operation Healing Heroes

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: On a crisp Iowa November morning, everything comes together as Drake Lamb with Midwest Whitetail grunts in a massive 8-point buck that he encountered before with the WoodHaven Midwest Grunter. This is one hunt you don't want to miss!

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: Mark Scroggins and his family are in Oklahoma and spot a big gobbler from the road. They are pretty sure they can get in position to call him in, but they have to be quick without being seen. His step-daughter Destiny is behind the trigger.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: Andy visits the land of Scotland; he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette.
Team200 members Kris Seymour and Wade Fatool chase giant bulls in New Mexico!

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: The personal story of a Purple Heart veteran who finds quiet healing in the woods, one arrow at a time.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films
programme.desc: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms; Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring.

programme.title: Pure Hunting Short Films
programme.desc: Willi spends eight days chasing bucks but has his sights set on "High Beam"; after encounters, including one on his last morning, he hopes for last-minute success on his last afternoon.

programme.title: The Bearded Buck
programme.desc: It's turkey time and The Bearded Buck crew is going on a tour! Starting in Florida, Jerry and Austin are hunting Osceolas with Jeff Budz. From there, Jerry and Cud are headed out to hunt with our good friend, Ron Kendra,in his home state of Virginia.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: The Raven Project - Summer Maintenance And Hog Hunting
programme.desc: Randy and his brother Cody are at the Dirty Bird ranch in Oklahoma doing some summer time maintenance and trying their best to control the hog population by doing a little hog hunting.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The story of a true old school deer camp meeting new world management practices to take a raw piece of hunting land and develop it into whitetail Mecca.

programme.title: Just Shot: Realtree Road Trips
programme.desc: In this episode, Tyler sets up before daylight, calls in a stubborn gobbler, and gets a second chance at the bird that's been haunting him.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: 20 Yards AGAIN?!? Shooter Buck in RANGE
programme.desc: The Big Eight shows up once again in front of Pitts; he hopes to be able to get a shot this time.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: In this episode, we break down how weather impacts your setup and strategy, and how to use it to your advantage. Then we head to Oklahoma for an exciting whitetail hunt, where patience and preparation come together for a shot at a mature buck.

programme.title: Mark Peterson's The Journey Within

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Texas is a land rich and plentiful, and one of the country's most sought-out destinations to hunt wild game; its hunting culture is driven by family and values, and the trophy itself is embedded within the experience.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lone Star Beer. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

programme.title: LBP Spotlight

programme.title: LBP Spotlight

programme.title: LBP Spotlight

programme.title: LBP Spotlight

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Slade and the crew are finally able to catch up with these elk despite some pretty terrible weather conditions. It comes right down to the wire! Don't miss it.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

programme.desc: In this episode Slade travels to Kansas to try and bag one of the Midwest's most impressive deer!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade ends the saga with a deer he has watched for a few years, Pope. On a previous episode you saw Slade put in all the work with feeder and food plot strategy to make the stars align.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Hunting Next to a Haunted House
programme.desc: Historic St. Francisville, La., holds the "old South" feel that is ever so fleeting; hunting on a local property and getting a beautiful long-bearded turkey on the ground.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Host and real estate agent, Slade Priest, educates on everything from purchasing and flipping hunting properties, to improving existing ones.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Productivity slows for the agents as they work to sell real estate during turkey season.

programme.sub-title: Sight Casting Rising Trout in Idaho
programme.desc: Setting out across the country on a road trip visiting and fishing with local fly shops to highlight small businesses that drive a beloved sport: fly-fishing.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We join Bobby Falkenberg as he joins Bret Ferguson from Double T Outfitters. Bobby is an avid outdoorsman, judge, and father. Bret manages 30,000 acres in Ozona TX, the knowledge he has of every inch of this amazing low fence ranch is remarkable.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt as they tag alongside Dr. James Kroll for his annual deer day.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Joining John Sewell and Laramie Barrett from Fortified Cottonseed; Laramie gets to see first hand how their product works in the field as John has implemented it 365 days a year.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Each year, the crew gets to spend time in camp with some friends; Zach from Big & J gets some time in a blind while reflecting on what hunting in Texas means to him; Texas provides a wide variety of game.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoors
programme.desc: Tournament angler Blair Wiggins of "Addictive Fishing" continues his fishing adventures but also shares his love of everything outdoors, including hunting, cooking, beekeeping and more.

programme.desc: Tournament angler Blair Wiggins of "Addictive Fishing" continues his fishing adventures but also shares his love of everything outdoors, including hunting, cooking, beekeeping and more.

programme.desc: Tournament angler Blair Wiggins of "Addictive Fishing" continues his fishing adventures but also shares his love of everything outdoors, including hunting, cooking, beekeeping and more.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff venture deep into Maine's backcountry with their buddy Chuck, ice fishing remote lakes; their journey ends at the ghost trains, a pair of abandoned locomotives that now rest as silent monuments to a forgotten logging era.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff wade into the flooded timber of the Coca-Cola Woods, where mallards drop through the treetops in waves; they experience one of America's most storied duck hunts.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: Kyle and Jeff scour the rugged mountains of southern Arizona in search of the Coues deer, known to hunters as the Grey Ghost; they test their skill and patience pursuing one of North America's most challenging big game animals.

programme.title: The Green Way Outdoors
programme.desc: The Green Way team continue their African journey with hunts for both the majestic Kudu and elusive Golden Wildebeest.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - MASSIVE February MONSTER ----- Bill Jordan's Louisiana Buck
programme.desc: Realtree's Bill Jordan finally gets the invite to hunt with his son Tyler at the world famous Honey Brake Lodge in Louisiana. Honey Brake is a part of the Deer Management Assistance Program (DMAP) which allow them to harvest whitetails into February.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Seek One Turkey Hunt - Perfect Hunt Off Roost
programme.desc: Realtree/Seek One hunt giveaway winner Jake Snyder is joined by Seek One hosts Drew Carroll and Lee Ellis as well as Tyler Jordan for a turkey hunt on Realtree Farms; Jake's hunt is as perfect as possible off roost.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: 15-Yard Miss and Noon Redemption -- Georgia Turkeys on Fire
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan chases a couple of turkeys in Harris County, Georgia, on opening weekend of the season; the gobbling frenzy starts at daylight, but pretty quickly, a few deer bust the setup; shortly before lunch, Jordan strikes two birds.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: PCB's white sand beaches are jam-packed with visitors soaking up the sun and surf while Justin and Meredith chase schools of migrating tarpon just offshore.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Releasing a defeated tarpon healthy after an epic battle is the ultimate victory; for Justin, putting Ethan on his first silver king needs patience and a local chef's tasty diversion.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Meredith learns the value of the Trash Can Slam on a flounder trip with Capt. Justin that turns into a multi-species challenge.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Capt. Justin Leake and Meredith McCord divert attention from what's not happening with the tarpon bite to using CoastMaster, light tackle and experience to find snapper success on heavily fished public spots.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: How important is the wild harvest to communities in North America? Dan Cabela travels from Kansas to Newfoundland in search of the answer, meeting communities who rely on the yearly cycle.

programme.title: Hard Truths Of Conservation
programme.desc: Often misunderstood, brown bears are one of North America's most formidable predators. Taking part in a scientific collaring program to better understand predator-prey interactions, Dan Cabela travels to Kodiak Island to meet the research team.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: Catching up with an old friend, Carl Parks; Carl's son CJ was killed in a tragic accident in 2018; spending a day of fishing and reflection and celebration of CJ's life.

programme.title: The Direction
programme.desc: Mark is joined by Matt Ogle, a professional bowler that Mark has known since Matt was 10 years old. Mark has been close to their family and has watched Matt grow into the bowling pro he is today. Matt was raised to love bassin' and bowling.

programme.title: Sail Kings

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun
programme.desc: Joined by PCB's Artificial Reef Coordinator Erin Graham Capt Justin fish previously dropped reefs before sinking the famed BLACK PEARL from iconic films right off Panama City Beach, FL.

programme.sub-title: Grouper and Tarpon with Jamey Caldwell

programme.desc: Capts. Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Richard Black for an exciting adventure in Key Largo, catching a wide variety of fish species on the shallow reef.

programme.title: Hooked on The Palm Beaches

programme.desc: Joined by PCB's Artificial Reef Coordinator Erin Graham Capt Justin fish previously dropped reefs before sinking the famed BLACK PEARL from iconic films right off Panama City Beach, FL.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting TV
programme.desc: Knowing when to spot and stalk is crucial for any hunter. In this episode of DDH-TV, Mark Kayser breaks down three key factors for success, while Dan Schmidt puts them into action as he stalks a buck in Nebraska's Sandhills.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: In this special 20th-anniversary episode, Deer & Deer Hunting TV takes a nostalgic journey through two decades of hunting television. Hosts Dan Schmidt and Brad Rucks lead viewers through memorable moments.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Mike heads to Table Rock Lake to meet up with Trenton and his family; even battling the tough fishing conditions following a heavy front, there's never a lack of family time, laughs or friendly competitions with the Southards.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Trenton meets up with Andrew Norbye on Lake Guntersville in Alabama; with not a lot of current being pulled, the deep schools weren't set up to feed, so they go up shallow to fish grass until evening time when the ledge fish really start biting.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.sub-title: Summer Time Borderline and Clover Plot Maintenance
